title: This Is Mine to Hold
subtitle: An affirmation for staying with money that arrived without being worked for
excerpt: A short affirmation for the moment when guilt about unearned money keeps the money at arm's length. States the straightforward fact: the money is yours to keep.

content.text: A short affirmation for the week or month after unearned money lands, the period when the guilt or the uncertainty keeps making the money feel provisional. The affirmation is direct: it is yours to hold. Not to justify. Not to immediately redistribute. Not to explain.
This is mine to hold. I receive it without apology. I keep it without guilt. It is mine.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on chest. Once is enough at any other moment when the guilt is up, the phrase is short enough to use in the middle of a day.
